title: Explain cultural surprise
subtitle: Talk about what surprised you.
overview: Culture talk needs observation, comparison, and reaction.
Avoid saying everyone always does something.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: En mi país suele ser diferente.
In my country it is usually different.
No digo que sea mejor o peor.
I am not saying it is better or worse.

items.es: Me sorprendió que la gente cenara tan tarde.
items.en: It surprised me that people ate dinner so late.

items.es: En mi país suele ser diferente.
items.en: In my country it is usually different.

items.es: No digo que sea mejor o peor.
items.en: I am not saying it is better or worse.
It is simply a different custom.

items.es: Con el tiempo, empecé a entenderlo mejor.
items.en: Over time, I started to understand it better.
